transcripts.title: INDUSTRY ALERT: Apple co-founder drops BLUNT warning on the future of AI
transcripts.author: Liz Claman Interview with Steve Wozniak
transcripts.transcript: LIZ: FROM FLOPY DISKS TO FACE TIME, APPLE CELEBRATES 50TH ANNIVERSARY THIS YEAR. THE TECH GIANT KICKING IDENTIFY CELEBRATION -- OFF CELEBRATION MARCH 13 AT NEW YORK CITY GRAND CENTRAL. TAKING FESTIVITIES WORLDWIDE WA EVENTS ALL OVER THE WORLD, MAKING ITS WAY BACK TO APPLE PARK IN CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA NEXT WEEK FOR OFFICIAL ANNIVERSARY APRIL 1 IT STARTED 1976 WITH STEVE JOBS, THE MARKETS GENIUS. NOW 3.7 TRILLION DOLLAR, AND STEVE WOZNIAK WAS ENGINEERING BRAIN, INVENTING COMPANY'S FIRST COMPUTERS, APPLE 1, AND BIG HIT APPLE 2, JOINING ME NOW, APPLE COFOUNDER STEVE WOZNIAK, STEVE. WOW. FIRST, 50 YEARS. DOES CAN IT FEEL LIKE THIS FOR YOU? >> I DON'T HAVE TIME, TIME TELLS US IT MOVING FORWARD IN ONE DIRECTION. AND NO, I COULDN'T TELL YOU -- I DON'T DO YEARS. I MEAN, EVEN OR ANNIVERSARY TODAY, I DON'T KNOW HOW MANY YEARS I COUNT DAYS, 6436 DAYS TODAY. LIZ: OKAY. WELL, YOU HAD. BACK TO THE APPLE 1 PERSONAL COMPUTER, FIRST RELEASE APRIL -- 1. >> WE FORMED OUR PARTNERSHIP ON APRIL 1. LIZ: THIS THING LACKED A CASE AND POWER SUPPLY, NO KEY BOARD. NO DISPLAY, THEY WERE ALL THINGS THAT WERE PROVIDED BY THE USERS, WHAT IT WAS LIKE, BACK TO THAT MOMENT YOU WERE BUILDING AND YOU PRESSED ON, AND 'WORKED? >> WELL, I WAS INFLUENCED BY A LOT OF PEOPLE THAT BELIEVES COMPUTERS WOULD CHANGE SOCIETY, THEY WERE TRYING TO BUILD COMPUTER S BY STAN ORD METHOD, I BUILT ONE OF MY OWN 5 YEARS BEFORE, I WANTED SOMETHING TO BE MERE HUMAN THAT YOU COULD USE LIKE A TYPEWRITER, YOU COULD TYPE IN PROGRAMS, I HAD A DIFFERENT APPROACH, I WOULD SHOW IT OFF, THAT IS HOW I COULD COMMUNICATE, THEY WAS TOO SHY TO TALK TO PEOPLE, I WOULD SHOW OFF THINGS THAT I DESIGNED, I DIDN'T INTEND TO START A COMPANY OR, I WAS A GREAT COMPUTER DESIGNER BUT I DIDN'T WANT TO GET RICH, I JUST WANTED OTHER ENGINEERS TO SEE AMAZING THINGS THAT I WAS THINKING UP. I HAD THIS APPLE 1, DOWN TO THE CLUB, IT WAS NOT A WOZNIAK COMPUTER. IT WAS SOMETHING THAT I BUILT BEFORE TO GET ON THE WERA NET -- THAT IS NOW INTERNET, 6 FAR AWAY COMPUTERS, ACROSS COUNTRY, I I ACCESS THEM FOR FREE ON THE ARPA, NET, I COULD DO THAT I ADDED BRAINS AND MICROPROCESSOR AND RIGHT MEMORY, PEOPLE LOOKING OVER MY SHOULDER EVERY COMPUTER, AFTER I WAS SHOWING THAT, THAT CAME OUT HAD A KEYBOARD AND VIDEO DISPLAY IT WAS A CHANGE ON HOW COMPUTING LOOK AND FELT IT WAS MORE HUMAN, SO. I DON'T KNOW, I WAS -- IT WAS GREAT, I JUST WANTED OTHER ENGINEERS TO SEE IT AND RESPECT MY ABILITY. LIZ: I'M ON THE PHONE WITH THEM AFTER THE SHE.  SHOW, YOU TURNED IT ON AND YOU WORKED YOU CREATED IT, WAS STEVE JOBS THERE? WERE YOU HIGH FIVE EACH OTHER? >> I HAD TERMINAL FAR AWAY COMPUTERS, GET IN MY MIND MICROPROCESSOR I WAS DESIGNING IN HIGH SCHOOL, I WANTED MY OWN COMPUTER, I TOLD MY DAD I WOULD HAVE MY OWN, SO BUILT IT UP, I COULD -- DOWN AT HEWLETT-PACKARD ONE NIGHT I WROTE ENOUGH OF A PROGRAM HAD TO BE PROGRAMS IN TWO CHIPS TO HAVE 256 BYTES, THIS IS WHAT TOIPTD WANTED TO SHOW, COMPUTER AND DISPLAY ACCOUNTING ALL IN ONE. THE SMARTPHONE IS A BABY COMPUTER, WHAT DO YOU THINK THIS NEXT ITERATION WILL LOOK LIKE WILL IT BE LIKE A LAPTOP. >> I THINK SIMILAR TO TODAY HAPPENED HELD, AND -- HAND-HELD, CARS, HOW MUCH HAVE THEY CHANGED IN PERSPECTIVE. 4 WHEELS ON GROUND, A CONTAINER THIS SITS A CERTAIN NUMBER OF PEOPLE AND TAKE YOU TO USEFUL PLACES, IT DIDN'T CHANGE MUCH FOR 150 YEARS, ONCE YOU FIND A GOOD FORMULA, WHAT PEOPLE WANT, ARE WE GOING TO THINK THOUGHTS AND I DON'T HAVE DO ANY WORK. I -- MY BEST BEVICE IS AWARABLE, A WATCH, I USE THE WATCH, MY COMPUTER. SO, WHERE IS GOING? I COULD STILL VERY MUCH LIKE -- I THINK STILL VERY MUCH LIKE TODAY, WE SHOW VALUE OF THAT, I DON'T KNOW DEFINE ME A WAY DO IT PUT A CHIP IN BRAIN, AND BRAIN HAS TO THINK, AND THINGS HAPPEN, I DON'T BELIEVE IN THAT. LIZ: ONE PRINCIPLE FROM EARLY APPLE TO A.I. OR ANY COMPUTER, WHAT WOULD IT BE? >> WELL, HONESTLY, IT IS HIGHEST PRINCIPLE OF MY LIFE, DOWN SAY THINGS THAT SOUND GOOD, SAY THINGS THAT ARE REAL AND YOU KNOW THEM. THAT WOULD BE ONE ADVICE TO A.I., AND ANOTHER WOULD BE YOU KNOW, WE COULD MAKE A BRAIN BUT TROUBLE, IT TAKES 9 MONTHS. LIZ: THAT IS A SLIGHT TROUBLE. IT WAS NOT JUST A PRODUCT BUT A HUGE TURNING POINT IN THE PERSONAL COMPUTER WORLD, THEN THE COME PORTS CAME IN -- COMPETITORS CAME IN THERE WAS SOMETHING ABOUT APPLE, IN EARLY DAYS THEY WERE SAYING FOR GRAPHIC ARTISTS NOW EVERYONE HAS THEM. >> BECAUSE THE COMPANY ADOBE INVENTED PHOTOSHOP IT NEEDED ENOUGH MEMORY AND ONLY MACINTOSHES HAD THAT. IT WOULD JUST RUN ON OUR COMPUTERS. MY GOD THAT CHANGES THE WORLD'S LOT, IT GOT US ASSOCIATED WITH CREATIVITY. DONE. LIZ: DO YOU THINK THEY WILL ADVANCE TO WHERE YOU CAN CONTROL IT WITH YOUR EYES? I AM TRYING TO THING OF THINGS. >> I WOULD NOT THINK OF THESE HUMAN EYE AND BRAIN CONTROL THINGS. BECAUSE, THEY HAVE BEEN TOO SLOW FOR USEFUL WORK, IT IS INTERESTING AND FUN WHEN PLAY WITH IT, WHICH I HAVE, BUT NO, YOU WANT TO CHANGE WORLD TO USEFUL THINGS. >> ONE THING YOU DID CHANGE THE WORLD ON, AFTER YOU TEMPORARILY LEFT APPLE. YOU DISRUPTED THE CONCERT WORLD. WE COULD TALK ABOUT 50TH ANNIVERSARY AND iPHONE, THEY DON'T KNOW ABOUT THE US FESTIVAL UNLESS YOU ARE A CALIFORNIAN LIKE ME, THE FIRST COSMIC CRASH OF MUSIC AND TECHNOLOGY ON STAGE. YOU HAD 3 DAY CONCERTS WITH HUGE SCREENS, THAT WERE ON THE STAGE -- >> FIRST TIME EVER, FIRST TIME EVER. SCREEN IN UNITED STATES, AT A CONCERT, LARGEST STAGE EVER FIRST TIME, AMPHITHEATER WE BUILT FOR 50 MILLION DOLLARS, THAT AT A COUNTY PARK, HALF WAY INTO IT SPEAKERS WITH DELAYED SOUND. SO MANY FIRST AND FIRST, IT WAS FIRST THREE SPACE BRIDGES WITH SOVIET UNION DURING COLD WAR IT WAS SHOCKING WE SENT THEM VIDEO AND THEY SENT US VIDEO. WITH EQUIPMENT SET UP FOR 1980 OLYMPICS, THAT U.S.-BACKED OUT BECAUSE SOVIET UNION INVADED AFGHANISTAN. -- THEY HAD TOP AMERICAN AND RUSSIAN GROUPS THAT WAS IMPORTANT TO ME, WE GOT A LOT OF PUBLICITY IN RUSSIA BUT NOTHING IN UNITED STATES BECAUSE RUSSIAN AND UNITED STATES, PRIME MEDIA WAS NOT INTERESTED IN PEACE TALK. LIZ: HOW DO YOU VIEW THAT. >> YOU ARE DEPENDENT ON IT. BUT, I LIKE, I DON'T LIKE -- I WANT TO KNOW A HUMAN BEING LIKE MYSELF IS THINKING KNOWING WHAT I MIGHT FEEL AND UNDERSTANDING EMOTIONS, I TRY A FEW TESTS TO A.I. AND I'LL ASK A QUESTION, YOU KNOW MIGHT BE, WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN IN AND THAT IT WILL TALK USEFUL DETAILS BUT NOT DIFFERENCE, OR HOW DO BUSINESS COME ABOUT, YOU AS A HUMAN KNOW THAT I WANT TO KNOW WHAT IS THAT STORY, IT WILL GIVE ME DETAILS WELL WRITTEN ABOUT TWO A AND B THINGS, NO. I WANT SUCH RELIABLE CONTENT EVERY TIME, I AM NOT A FAN OF A.I. LIZ: I AM FINDING THIS FASCINATING, I FEEL LIKE TECHNOLOGY IN A WAY, NATIONS OUR LIVES BET -- OUR LIVES BETTER BUT IT COULD MAKE US DUMBER, I LOVE WAZE THAT TELLS YOU WHERE THERE IS TRAFFIC, KIDS TODAY CAN'T READ A MAP, ARE WE ATROPHYING OUR BREAK IN A WAY. >> YES, PUTINS SET THAT IN MOTION, TODAY IS A LOT -- COMPUTERS SET THAT IN MOTION, WE ARE DIFFERENT FROM WHERE WE ARE, YOU BOUGHT A COMPUTER AND YOU RAN IT AND IT SOLVED OUR PROBLEM, IT WAS YOURS, NOW YOU HAVE TO SUBSCRIBE TO SERVICES, AND PAY SOMETHING A MONTH THEY MAKE CHANGES IN HOW THINGS WORK AND YOUR MUSSEL MEMORY CHANGE -- MUSCLE MEMORY CHANGES, THEY TAKE THINGS AWAY. FEATURES YOU WERE USING THEY WILL TAKE YOUR DATA AWAY SOMETIMES, YOU CAN'T COUNT ON ANYTHING, MAYBE YOU DIDN'T PAY A BILL. NO, I DON'T LIKE THE BUSINESS MODELS OF TODAY, WHERE YOU DON'T OWN IT, YOU ARE OWNED, WHOEVER THE SUPPLIERS ARE YOU HAVE TO GO THROUGH THEM ON CLOUD, INTERNET, INTERNET CAME AND THINGS FOR BEAUTIFUL LOOKING AT FIRST, THEY CHANGED AND ALL BUSINESS MODELS, SO I'M NOT A SUPER FAN OF WHEN I DON'T FEEL THAT I OWN SOMETHING, I LIKE A COUPLE -- TINY SMALL SIMPLE GAMES BECAUSE, THEY ARE ON MY iPHONE, ON MY COMPUTER, THEY DON'T USE THE INTERNET.
